critiques.finding: Journal.tsx popup handlers (handleAddMilestone, handleLogRelapse, handleEditMilestone, handleEditRelapse) are empty no-ops with JOURNAL-06/07 comments — buttons click with no visible feedback until downstream popups land.
critiques.alternative: JOURNAL-06/07 should replace stubs with setState + Dialog mounts on first implement turn; optional interim toast is out of scope but avoids silent clicks during parallel waves.

critiques.finding: Milestone delete icon (ai_RNbBHXjm) shares onEditMilestone with edit (ai_RNbBHXjk) and uses aria-label 'Edit milestone options' — delete workflow is scoped to JOURNAL-06 edit popup but dual icons may confuse until popup distinguishes actions.
critiques.alternative: JOURNAL-06 EditMilestonePopup should own delete; consider distinct aria-label on ai_RNbBHXjm or route delete to a dedicated onDeleteMilestone prop if Bubble workflow separates icons.

critiques.finding: onboarding_data fallback assigns crypto.randomUUID() when array entries lack id, producing unstable React keys across reloads for legacy onboarding blobs.
critiques.alternative: Derive deterministic key from title_text + achieved_at_date hash or require id on write paths in JOURNAL-06.

critiques.finding: UntypedSupabase cast bypasses generated client types for uds_milestone/uds_relapseevent — necessary while tables are absent from prototype schema but should be removed when migrations land.
critiques.alternative: Regenerate Supabase types and drop UntypedSupabase once uds_* tables exist in frontend/supabase or project contract.
